_readme: Performance Memory — adaptive learning log. Tracks what was generated, what was skipped, and WHY it was skipped. The skill asks before drawing conclusions.

skip_reasons._readme: Logged when user skips a format and gives a reason. Used to understand WHY something was skipped — not just that it was.

format_signals._readme: Soft signals built from skip reasons. Values: 'situational' (skip had a reason, still show sometimes), 'low-fit' (user said it doesnt suit ARETE), 'timing' (skipped because wrong day/topic not wrong format). Never fully removes a format.
